content: In-browser ML inference (TF.js and similar) eliminates ~100ms+ server round-trip latency that would otherwise be required for the 800ms-scale hesitation window this SDK targets; small models (comparable in scale to a tiny 2-layer feedforward net) run in low single-digit to tens of milliseconds client-side. Confirms the architectural necessity of on-device inference for any hesitation-window-scale (sub-second to few-second) intervention.
